heading:
I turn digital noise
into real results.
subheading: Digital marketing strategist with 5+ years helping brands grow online through data-driven campaigns and creative strategy.
bio: I started in digital marketing because I was fascinated by the intersection of psychology and data — understanding why people click, convert, and come back. Over the years I've worked with e-commerce brands, SaaS companies, and local businesses, helping each of them find their voice online and turn it into revenue.

My approach is simple: understand the business deeply, identify the highest-leverage channel, run fast experiments, and double down on what works. I don't believe in vanity metrics — every campaign I run is tied to a real business outcome.
Outside of work, I stay sharp by following industry shifts — algorithm updates, new ad formats, emerging platforms — and testing them before most agencies even know they exist.

values.title: Results first
values.desc: Every campaign is tied to a real business metric — not impressions or followers.

values.title: Always testing
values.desc: Hypotheses, experiments, learnings. I never "set and forget" a campaign.

values.title: Transparent
values.desc: Clear reporting, honest assessments, no jargon. You always know what's happening.

values.title: Fast execution
values.desc: Speed matters in marketing. I move fast, iterate, and scale what works.

ctaSubtext: Let's talk about your brand and how I can help you grow.
